---
title: "MeyerPerin Foundation"
title-meta: "Articles and Blog"
toc: true
toc-expand: true
listing:
- id: blog
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  feed:
    type: full
  fields: [image, author, date, title, subtitle]
  image-height: 320px
  categories: false
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true

page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
include-in-header: _msft-clarity.html
---

The MeyerPerin Foundation is a nonprofit organization dedicated to the advancement of science and technology, with a focus on Artificial Intelligence and Education. 

We are especially interested in helping neurodivergent people thrive in their scientific pursuits, especially those with Autism and ADHD.

## Blog

:::{#blog}
:::
